name: top-sheet
description: Gesture-driven top sheet that slides down from the top edge with drag-to-dismiss support.

props.name: visible
props.description: Controls whether the sheet is shown

props.name: onClose
props.description: Callback invoked when the sheet is dismissed via upward drag or backdrop press

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the top sheet

props.name: maxHeight
props.description: Maximum sheet height as a fraction of the screen height (0–1)

props.name: showHandle
props.description: Whether to show the drag handle indicator at the bottom of the sheet

props.name: style
props.description: Additional style applied to the sheet container
